properties.name: security.jwt.secret
properties.description: HMAC-SHA256 signing secret used to validate incoming JWT tokens. Must match the auth-service secret.

properties.name: security.jwt.issuer
properties.description: Expected JWT issuer claim (iss). Must match the auth-service issuer.

properties.name: security.jwt.access-token-ttl-minutes
properties.description: Access token TTL in minutes (used for resource-server clock-skew tolerance).
